{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Asphodel Travelers
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Most [[Asphodel Travelers]] stayed behind to defend the city.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c22">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Asphodel Travelers]] generally do not experience much emotion.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c19">''City of Light'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
